s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BLOWER WITH FAN MOTOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the blower with fan motor sub-assembly with the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR INLET SERVO MOTOR (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air inlet servo motor with the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLEAN AIR FILTER (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the clean air filter as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR FILTER COVER PLATE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the air filter cover plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws to install the air duct sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BLOWER WITH FAN MOTOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the blower with fan motor sub-assembly with the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR INLET SERVO MOTOR (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air inlet servo motor with the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLEAN AIR FILTER (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the clean air filter as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR FILTER COVER PLATE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the air filter cover plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws to install the air duct sub-assembly.
